help.title: Help Center
help.q1: How do I get a match?
help.a1: You can browse other users' profiles on the discover screen and like people whose workout goals match yours. If they like you back, it's a match and you can start messaging.
help.a2: Go to the chat with the matched person from the messages screen and press the 'Unmatch' button from the options menu in the top right to end the match.
help.a3: As long as you don't turn on the Private Profile setting, other users on the platform can see your profile on the discover screen.
help.q4: How can I reset my password?
help.a4: You can send a reset link to your registered email address by clicking on the 'Change Password' option in the Account Settings section.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
Last Updated: June 12, 2026

1. SCOPE OF SERVICE
The GymBuddy app is a platform that allows athletes to match with each other and find workout partners.

2. USER OBLIGATIONS
Users agree to use the platform in compliance with the law and in a way that does not disturb other users. Profanity, insults, and harassment are strictly prohibited within the app.

3. ACCOUNT SECURITY
Password and account security are entirely the responsibility of the user. The support team must be informed when an unwanted situation is encountered.

4. SERVICE CHANGES
GymBuddy reserves the right to change or completely remove some features of the service without prior notice.

5. CONTACT
You can contact us at support@gymbuddy.com for your questions about the terms of use.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Last Updated: June 12, 2026

1. DATA COLLECTED
GymBuddy collects your name, email address, profile photo, workout goals, gym preferences, and in-app messaging data to provide you with a better service.

2. USE OF DATA
This collected data is used to provide the most accurate match with other athletes, increase your workout performance, and personalize your user experience.

3. DATA SHARING
Your personal data is never shared with third parties or institutions, except for legal obligations.

4. DATA SECURITY
Your data is stored encrypted on secure servers (Supabase). Industry-standard security measures are taken for your information security.

5. ACCOUNT DELETION AND DATA DESTRUCTION
When you delete your account using the 'Delete My Account' option in the settings section, all your personal information and match history are permanently deleted from our database.
